species.citation: L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 511 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 325; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 45. = Bombax malabaricum DC. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 1 (1824) 479; ≡ Salmalia malabarica (DC.) Schott & Endl. , Melet. Bot. (1832) 35; ≡ Gossampinus malabarica (DC.) Merr. , Lingnan Sci. J. 5 (1927) 126. = Melaleuca grandiflora Blanco , Fl. Filip., 1st Ed. (1837) 615.
species.distribution: Australia, Bangladesh, Bismarck Arch, Borneo, Cambodia, China, India, Java, Laos, Lesser Sunda Isls, Malay Peninsula, Moluccas, Myanmar, Nepal, New Guinea, Pakistan, Philippines, Solomon Isls, Sri Lanka, Sulawesi, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. CAMIGUIN, LUZON: Abra, Bataan, Bulacan, Ifugao, NCR, Nueva Ecija, Rizal, MINDANAO: Misamis Oriental (photos), MINDORO, ?PANAY (photos).
species.notes: Scattered in secondary and primary forests at low and medium elevation.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 10 September 2024

species.citation: (S.Vidal) Becc. , Malesia 3 (1889) 273 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 46; Cortez et al., Check List 19 (2023) 988; ≡ Cumingia philippinensis S.Vidal , Phan. Cuming. Philipp. (1885) 212; Type: Vidal 653, 1170 (MA, syn), Luzon: Tayabas, Unisan Prov.
species.distribution: Philippines, Sulawesi. BASILAN, BOHOL, BUSUANGA, LUZON: Quezon, MASBATE, MINDANAO: Sultan Kudarat (photos), Zamboanga, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY, SIARGAO.
species.notes: Edges of mangroves and tidal streams. 0m.

species.citation: Ulbr. , Notizbl. Königl. Bot. Gart. Berlin 6 (1914) 163.

species.citation: (L.) Gaertn. , Fruct. Sem. Pl. 2 (1791) 244 ; Merr., Fl. Manila (1912) 326; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 45; ≡ Bombax pentandrum L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 511. = Eriodendron anfractuosum DC. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 1 (1824) 479.
species.distribution: Neotropics. DANJUGAN (photos), LUZON: Camarines Sur (photos), Sorsogon (photos), MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), PANAY (photos).
species.notes: Planted in the settled areas throughout the Philippines and naturalized.
